name: Effectiv
description: Effectiv is a fraud, risk and compliance decisioning platform that orchestrates KYC, KYB, device, transaction and AML signals through a single API. Its no-code workflow builder and AI models help fintechs, banks and marketplaces onboard and

seo.title: Effectiv — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: Effectiv: Effectiv is a fraud, risk and compliance decisioning platform that orchestrates KYC, KYB, device, transaction and AML signals through a single API. It

when_to_use: KYC and AML signal orchestration via single API for fintechs
No-code fraud rule builder for transaction risk policies
Device and behavior signal fusion for account opening risk
Real-time fraud decisioning for BNPL approval workflows
Compliance and fraud unified decisioning for neobanks

pros: Single API for KYC, KYB, device and AML signals
No-code workflow builder for risk ops
cons: Younger platform with smaller reference base
Depth per signal thinner than specialist vendors
Still need to pay for underlying data vendors
review.verdict: Good orchestration layer if you already juggle many fraud vendors, less compelling as a sole risk stack.
review.best_for: Fintechs and marketplaces orchestrating multiple KYC, device and AML data providers.
review.not_for: Teams wanting a single integrated fraud engine with built-in proprietary data.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
